message:
fix(pager,mvcc,vdbe,core): harden commit paths, validation, and codegen layout

Pager: consolidate freed-page drain and freelist serialization into the
shared commit() entry point, removing duplicate logic from commit_journal
and commit_wal. Fix formatting.

MVCC write coordinator: add lease-guard checks to native_publish,
compat_commit, and compat_commit_batch -- reject requests when no active
coordinator lease is held. Add has_active_lease() helper and 3 tests.

VDBE codegen: fix GROUP BY sorter column layout to allocate a dedicated
rowid slot for rowid-argument aggregates (e.g. SUM(rowid)), preventing
off-by-one sorter index corruption.

VDBE hash join: validate non-empty key columns and key arity match
between build and probe sides. Add 3 rejection tests.

Symbol log: add padded_len bounds validation in read_aligned_symbol_record
-- reject entries where logical_len > padded_len or padded range exceeds
file length. Add test for inconsistent index entry rejection.

Connection: add HAVING-only aggregate test (no GROUP BY) and reload_memdb
debug logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
